translations: Say He will give them life
puzzle.hint: A verse where Allah tells Prophet Muhammad (SAW) what to respond to those who doubt resurrection - about the One who created humanity initially being fully capable of reviving them.
puzzle.arabic: قُلْ يُحْيِيهَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَهَآ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍۢ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلْقٍ عَلِيمٌ
puzzle.verseEn: Say, "He will give them life who produced them the first time; and He is, of all creation, Knowing."
